Best AI Voice & Audio Tools (2026)

Text-to-speech, voice cloning, and audio editing tools powered by AI.

ElevenLabs by ElevenLabs

AI text-to-speech and voice cloning known for highly realistic voices.

✅ Free tier available — Free plan available (limited characters/month); paid plans from $5/mo

Murf AI by Murf

AI voiceover platform aimed at presentations, e-learning, and marketing videos.

✅ Free tier available — Free plan available; paid plans from $19/mo

Otter.ai by Otter.ai

AI meeting assistant that transcribes, summarizes, and extracts action items.

✅ Free tier available — Free plan available (limited minutes/month); paid plans from $8.33/mo
